From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**[Power forward](/wiki/Power_forward "Power forward")** is a position in basketball.

**Power forward** may also refer to:

* [Power forward (Australian rules football)](/wiki/Power_forward_(Australian_rules_football) "Power forward (Australian rules football)")
* [Power forward (ice hockey)](/wiki/Power_forward_(ice_hockey) "Power forward (ice hockey)")
* [*Power Forward* (album)](/wiki/Power_Forward_(album) "Power Forward (album)"), album by Wayne Tisdale
